compression_hints: Avoid explaining basic programming concepts unless the user asks for beginner guidance
Use standard technical terms instead of long descriptions
Omit obvious implementation steps when they do not affect requirements
Use JSON Schema or code comments instead of long natural-language format instructions
Use precise version numbers instead of vague latest-version language

example_gaps.missing_language: The user did not specify a programming language, so executable code cannot be targeted reliably
example_gaps.missing_framework: The framework is unspecified, so the AI may choose a stack that does not fit the project
example_gaps.missing_functionality: The core feature description is vague, which can produce output that misses expectations
example_gaps.missing_constraints: Constraints such as performance or library versions are missing, so the optimization direction is unclear
